name: Chinese Barbecued Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Dry sherry, gin, whiskey, brandy or rum
3 tbsp Dark soy sauce or 2 tbsp oyster sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the marinade ingredients together and pour over pork chops.
2. Marinate for 3-4 hours in the refrigerator, or for 1/2 hour unrefrigerated.
3. Grill pork chops for 15 minutes on each side, basting with leftover marinade every few minutes.
4. Serve 4-6. Can substitute chicken.
Origin: Homestyles, Canadian Classics
Shared by: Sharon Stevens
